translations.en: We originally wanted to go to the sea.
translations.es: Al principio queríamos ir a la playa.
translations.fr: Au départ, on voulait aller à la mer.
translations.ru: Изначально мы хотели поехать на море.
translations.pt: No início, queríamos ir à praia.
translations.vi: Ban đầu chúng tôi muốn đi biển.
translations.ar: في البداية كنا نريد الذهاب إلى البحر.
translations.nl: In eerste instantie wilden we naar zee.
translations.uk: Спочатку ми хотіли поїхати на море.
translations.hi: शुरू में हम समुद्र किनारे जाना चाहते थे.
translations.el: Στην αρχή θέλαμε να πάμε στη θάλασσα.
translations.id: Awalnya kami ingin pergi ke pantai.
translations.sv: Från början ville vi åka till havet.
translations.ro: La început voiam să mergem la mare.
translations.cs: Původně jsme chtěli jet k moři.
translations.ja: もともと海に行きたかった。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite modal auxiliary, preterite, 1PL; heads the clause and selects a (elliptical) infinitival complement.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause/VP, indicating the initial plan or intent.
Contraction of preposition 'an' + definite article 'das'; marks goal/direction (accusative) and heads the PP.
Neuter singular noun; complement of the preposition within the PP 'ans Meer' (accusative by government of 'an').

sentences.target: Der Termin war ursprünglich am Montag.

translations.de: Der Termin war ursprünglich am Montag.
translations.en: The appointment was originally on Monday.
translations.es: La cita originalmente era el lunes.
translations.fr: Au départ, le rendez-vous était lundi.
translations.pt: O compromisso era originalmente na segunda-feira.
translations.vi: Lịch hẹn ban đầu là vào thứ Hai.
translations.ar: كان الموعد في الأصل يوم الاثنين.
translations.nl: De afspraak was oorspronkelijk op maandag.
translations.el: Το ραντεβού ήταν αρχικά τη Δευτέρα.
translations.id: Janji temu awalnya pada hari Senin.
translations.sv: Tiden var från början på måndag.
translations.ja: もともと予約は月曜日でした。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; masculine nominative singular determiner of 'Termin'.
Masculine nominative singular; subject of the copular clause.
Finite copula, 3SG preterite; links the subject to the predicative temporal complement.
Temporal adverb modifying the copular clause.
Contraction of 'an' + definite article 'dem'; introduces a temporal PP with dative.
Masculine singular; complement of the preposition in the temporal PP 'am Montag' (dative by government of 'an').

sentences.target: Das Restaurant wirkt ursprünglich und gemütlich.

translations.de: Das Restaurant wirkt ursprünglich und gemütlich.
translations.en: The restaurant feels rustic and cozy.
translations.es: El restaurante es rústico y acogedor.
translations.fr: Le restaurant est rustique et chaleureux.
translations.it: Il ristorante è rustico e accogliente.
translations.yue: 呢間餐廳古色古香又溫馨。
translations.pt: O restaurante é rústico e aconchegante.
translations.vi: Nhà hàng mang cảm giác mộc mạc và ấm cúng.
translations.nl: Het restaurant is rustiek en gezellig.
translations.hi: रेस्टोरेंट देहाती और आरामदायक लगता है.
translations.el: Το εστιατόριο είναι παραδοσιακό και ζεστό.
translations.ja: そのレストランは素朴で居心地がいい。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; neuter nominative singular determiner of 'Restaurant'.
Neuter nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite lexical verb, 3SG present; copular-like predicate taking predicative adjective complements.
Positive-degree adjective used predicatively via 'wirkt'; coordinated with 'gemütlich'.
Coordinating conjunction linking two predicative adjectives.
Positive-degree adjective used predicatively; coordinated with 'ursprünglich'.

sentences.target: Das Rezept stammt ursprünglich von meiner Oma.
sentences.reading: /das ʁeˈtsɛpt ʃtamt ʊʁˈʃpʁʏŋlɪç fɔn ˈmaɪnɐ ˈoːma/

translations.de: Das Rezept stammt ursprünglich von meiner Oma.
translations.ipa: /das ʁeˈtsɛpt ʃtamt ʊʁˈʃpʁʏŋlɪç fɔn ˈmaɪnɐ ˈoːma/
translations.en: The recipe originally comes from my grandma.
translations.es: La receta originalmente es de mi abuela.
translations.fr: La recette vient à l'origine de ma grand-mère.
translations.it: La ricetta in origine è di mia nonna.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个食谱最初是我奶奶的。
translations.yue: 呢個食譜原本係我阿嫲嘅。
translations.ru: Этот рецепт изначально от моей бабушки.
translations.pt: A receita originalmente é da minha avó.
translations.vi: Công thức này ban đầu là của bà tôi.
translations.nl: Het recept komt oorspronkelijk van mijn oma.
translations.uk: Цей рецепт спочатку був від моєї бабусі.
translations.hu: A recept eredetileg a nagymamámtól származik.
translations.hi: यह रेसिपी मूल रूप से मेरी दादी से आई है.
translations.pl: Przepis pochodzi pierwotnie od mojej babci.
translations.el: Η συνταγή προέρχεται αρχικά από τη γιαγιά μου.
translations.nb: Oppskriften stammer opprinnelig fra bestemoren min.
translations.id: Resep ini awalnya dari nenek saya.
translations.sv: Receptet kommer ursprungligen från min mormor.
translations.ro: Rețeta provine inițial de la bunica mea.
translations.cs: Recept původně pochází od mojí babičky.
translations.da: Opskriften stammer oprindeligt fra min mormor.
translations.ja: このレシピはもともと祖母のものだ。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; neuter nominative singular determiner of 'Rezept'.
Neuter nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite lexical verb, 3SG present; intransitive verb selecting a 'von'-PP indicating source.
Adverb modifying the verb; indicates original origin/time frame.
Preposition governing dative; introduces the source phrase.
Possessive determiner; feminine dative singular agreeing with 'Oma'.
Feminine dative singular; object of the preposition 'von'.
